description: Order, purchase order, sales order, or transaction representing a request to fulfill goods or services

order_id.description: Unique identifier for the order (e.g., PO-2024-001)

customer.description: Customer or account name associated with the order

amount.description: Total monetary value of the order

status.description: Current fulfillment status of the order

date.description: Date the order was placed (ISO 8601 format)

items.description: List of items or line items included in the order
